name: Bohemian Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Sift together flour and salt.
5. Add the sifted ingredients and grated walnuts to the butter mixture.
6. Melt chocolate over hot water, then stir into the dough until combined.
7. Shape the dough into balls about the size of a shelled filbert.
8. Place the cookies on greased cookie sheets (they will spread during baking).
9. Bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 40 minutes.
10. Makes about 16 dozen small cookies.
